data.title: RED: Write behavioral tests for sprint-drift-check.sh
data.description:
## Description
Create behavioral test file for the new sprint-drift-check.sh script that detects codebase drift at sprint entry.

## TDD Requirement
Write failing tests FIRST. Tests will fail because sprint-drift-check.sh does not exist yet.
Add RED markers to .test-index to tolerate the expected failures.

## Test Approach
Create mock git repos with known commit histories and mock ticket CLI returning JSON with created_at timestamps and ## File Impact sections. Execute sprint-drift-check.sh against these fixtures and assert on structured output (DRIFT_DETECTED vs NO_DRIFT) and exit codes.

## Test Scenarios
1. No drift: files in impact table not modified since task creation → output NO_DRIFT, exit 0
2. Drift detected: file in impact table modified by external commit after task creation → output DRIFT_DETECTED with affected file list, exit 0
3. No file impact section on task ticket → graceful skip (no drift reported for that task)
4. Missing epic-id argument → non-zero exit with usage message
5. Epic with no children → NO_DRIFT, exit 0

## Files to Create
- tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check.sh

## Files to Modify
- .test-index (add mapping: plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-drift-check.sh:tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check.sh with RED markers)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 4 test functions/sections
  Verify: grep -c 'echo "Test [0-9]' tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] .test-index entry maps sprint-drift-check.sh to test file with RED markers
  Verify: grep -q 'sprint-drift-check.sh' .test-index
- [ ] Tests are behavioral: create mock git repos and ticket CLI, execute the script, assert on output/exit code
  Verify: grep -q 'git init' tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (RED markers tolerate expected failures)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
